title: puccinellia distans subsp. convoluta
intro: Puccinellia distans subsp. convoluta, also known as Sea Bistort or Saltwort, is a plant species that belongs to the grass family and is native to coastal areas in Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Puccinellia distans subsp. convoluta include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against cellular damage, making it a promising natural remedy for cardiovascular and neurodegenerative diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
